content: Remote OK Business Analyst Rotaract Club of NIBM Kandy <strong>About the Role</strong><p>We are seeking a detail-oriented <strong>Business Analyst</strong> to evaluate business processes, identify improvement opportunities, and support data-driven decision-making.
